text: As I enter this space, I feel a sense of composure and anticipation. The clean, modern architecture evokes a feeling of calm, while the glass doors ahead create an impression of transparency and openness. Upon stepping inside, the vibrant colors and displays of the R+D space invigorate my curiosity. I feel intellectually stimulated, surrounded by innovation and the pursuit of knowledge. The presence of others reminds me of the collective nature of inquiry, and I feel quietly connected to the community of thinkers who have come together here.
